name: Misteri Wan Peah
overview:
Mysterious story of an old woman who lived in Kampung Kuala Pari Hilir. Deck strange demeanor, often alone and never smile like sitting in the dark than the villagers assume Wan Peah (Normah Damanhuri) defend perennial.

As a result of an incident in which three close friends of Yeh beetle (RAW Tokan), Li Kelubi (Zee Tokan) and Ghani Stuttering (Faiz Tapaw) was stumble upon Wan Peah until they get sick, Wan Peah diherdik and scorned by the villagers. They said Wan Peah use black magic and he was warned not to leave the house immediately.
